name: Potato Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a soup pot over low heat. Add onions and carrots and cook covered until the vegetables are tender and lightly colored, about 25 minutes.
2. Stir in parsley, chicken stock, and potatoes. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer until the potatoes are very tender, about 30 minutes.
3. Remove the soup from heat and let it stand covered for 5 minutes.
4. Transfer the soup solids to a food processor fitted with a steel blade. Add 1 cup of stock and process until smooth.
5. Return the pureed soup to the pot and add additional cooking liquid (about 3-4 cups) until the desired consistency is reached.
6. Return the soup to low heat, season with salt and pepper, and gradually stir in grated cheese. When all the cheese has melted, serve immediately. Garnish with croutons.
